stories.title: The fight against AI data centers is just beginning
stories.simple_summary: People and towns are starting to push back against the huge power plants being built to run AI systems. The fight over where these data centers can be built is just getting started.
stories.why_it_matters: If you live near where a data center might be built, this could affect your local power bills and neighborhood. Otherwise, this is mostly about big company decisions.

stories.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
stories.simple_summary: ChatGPT is hiring someone to make the AI tool work better for families and older adults. They want grandparents and caregivers to be able to use it more easily.
stories.why_it_matters: If you're an older adult or help take care of someone, ChatGPT might become easier for you to use soon.

stories.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
stories.simple_summary: Instagram had a new AI feature that let people create fake pictures of other people on Instagram. After lots of complaints, Instagram turned it off.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Instagram, you don't have to worry about AI fake pictures of you being made without your permission anymore.

stories.title: Meta turns off the Instagram feature that let users make AI deepfakes of public accounts
stories.simple_summary: Meta removed an Instagram feature that let people create AI-generated images based on anyone's public posts, even without asking permission. They stopped it because people didn't like it.
stories.why_it_matters: If you have a public Instagram account, your content is safer now because people can't automatically turn it into AI images without your say-so.

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
stories.simple_summary: Apple is suing OpenAI, saying that OpenAI employees who used to work at Apple stole secret information about hardware to help OpenAI build AI devices.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors and people who follow tech company lawsuits — nothing you need to act on right now.

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
stories.simple_summary: Apple is accusing OpenAI of stealing Apple's secret hardware designs, and says OpenAI's top leadership directed this.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a legal battle between two big tech companies — it doesn't directly affect ordinary people or small businesses yet.

stories.title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
stories.simple_summary: Open source AI (free AI that anyone can download and use) is growing fast. Companies are using shared AI tools instead of always paying big companies for AI.
stories.why_it_matters: If you run a small business, this could mean cheaper AI tools might become available to you in the future instead of paying expensive monthly fees.

stories.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
stories.simple_summary: A Korean chip company raised over $26 billion on Wall Street and is being asked to build chip factories in the United States to help with the AI boom.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors and the tech industry — it signals AI is a big business, but doesn't change what you can do today.

stories.title: Hugging Face’s CEO on why companies are done renting their AI
stories.simple_summary: Companies are moving away from renting AI from big companies and instead using free, shared AI tools they can run themselves. This is becoming a popular choice.
stories.why_it_matters: Small businesses might save money by using free AI tools instead of always paying for expensive subscriptions from big tech companies.

stories.title: Instagram’s Adam Mosseri: If you don’t like AI, ‘then you shouldn’t have it in your feed’
stories.simple_summary: Instagram's leader says he won't filter out or hide AI-made content on Instagram. Instead, he says you should be able to choose whether you want to see AI posts.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Instagram, you may see more AI-made content mixed in with regular posts unless you set your preferences to avoid it.

stories.title: Would you host part of an AI data center in your home?
stories.simple_summary: A solar company is asking customers to put AI computers in their homes and will pay them money to do it. The AI computers would use the homes as part of a network.
stories.why_it_matters: If you have solar panels or own your home, you might be able to earn extra money by letting this company put small computer boxes in your house.

stories.title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
stories.simple_summary: OpenAI's newest AI model (GPT 5.6) will be the main AI powering Microsoft's office and work tools like Outlook and Word.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Microsoft Office or work tools, they will continue using OpenAI's AI — this is a business agreement between two big companies.
